abstract.para: If you have a DLM resource (or other resources depending on DLM), make sure to explicitly stop those resources before putting the cluster or the node into maintenance mode. Stopping Pacemaker also stops the Corosync service, which DLM depends on. If Corosync stops, the DLM resource assumes a split-brain scenario and triggers a fencing operation.

step.para: Log in either as the &rootuser; user or as a user with sudo privileges.
Stop &dlm; and any &dlm;-dependent resources. You can stop multiple resources at once:
The --wait option makes sure the resource has really stopped before the command returns.
Check the status of the cluster:
&dlm; and any &dlm;-dependent resources should have the status Stopped.
